A fraction where the numerator and/or de: 分子和/或分母为多分子的分数
Factor both numerator and denominator, t: 乘数数和分母,然后取消共同系数
When is a rational expression undefined?: 理性表达式何时没有定义 ?
What are excluded values?: 什么是被排除在外的价值观?
The values of x that make the denominato: 使分母为零的 x 值

No — only cancel common FACTORS, not sep: 不 - - - 只取消共同的装置, 而不是单独的条款
Why must you state excluded values?: 为什么你必须说明被排斥的价值?
Because certain x-values make the denomi: 因为某些 x 值使分母零( 未定义)
x ≠ 2 and x ≠ −2 (where x² − 4 = 0): x  2 和 x   2 (在 x2 - 4 = 0 处)
